hero.title: Master Angular
hero.description: Learn how to build scalable, maintainable, and high-performance web applications using Angular with real-world projects and best practices.

angular basics.description: Learn Angular fundamentals including setup, architecture, modules, and CLI usage.

components & templates.description: Understand components, templates, data binding, and directives.

directives & pipes.description: Work with built-in and custom directives and pipes for dynamic UI rendering.

services & dependency injection.description: Learn services, dependency injection, and Angular architecture patterns.

routing.description: Handle navigation using Angular Router including lazy loading and guards.

forms.description: Work with template-driven and reactive forms with validation.

http & api.description: Integrate APIs using HttpClient, interceptors, and error handling.

state management.description: Manage application state using RxJS, NgRx, or signals.

performance & optimization.description: Optimize Angular apps using change detection strategies, lazy loading, and best practices.

advanced angular.description: Explore advanced topics like dynamic components, custom decorators, and architecture patterns.

seo.title: About This Angular Tutorial Series
seo.description: Angular is a powerful TypeScript-based framework for building enterprise-level web applications. This tutorial series covers Angular fundamentals, components, services, routing, forms, state management, and performance optimization with real-world use cases.
